summary: Comprehensive testing of Croc Consulting website completed. Backend API testing shows 100% success rate (13/13 tests passed). Frontend testing shows 95%+ functionality working correctly including homepage, navigation, Quote Submit Portal, Quote Portal with authentication, and AI generation.

ui_bugs.issue: Some form fields lack proper data-testid attributes making them harder to target reliably

design_issues.issue: Form submission works but no clear success message is displayed to user

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Services, How it works, About, Suppliers, CTA, Footer)
Navigation buttons work (Services, How it works, About scroll to sections)
Get a quote button opens Quote Submit Portal
View my quote button opens Quote Portal
Quote Submit Portal upload and fillout tabs work
Quote submission creates new submission successfully
Quote Portal login with ERG-2025/demo1234 credentials works
Quote Portal shows 3 demo quotes after login
Quote detail view shows progress, line items, RFI tabs
AI quote generation works with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor booking modal form field targeting issue)
